ModMetaData.name: LxO - Auto Cut Blight
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers
ModMetaData.description:
Automatically designates blighted plants for cutting the moment blight strikes. No more losing entire fields because you didn't notice in time.
Configurable: toggle on/off, set notification preference, choose whether to auto-cut only in home zone or everywhere.
Zero dependencies beyond Harmony. Lightweight. Just works.
